creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> Here is a new version of the patch, which adds an option for
> the docs and cleans up the Makefile a bit more, as you suggested.

Some small change:

Please add a

post-deinstall:
.if defined(WITH_DOCS)
	@${RM} -rf ${DOCSDIR}
.endif

to the Makefile.

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         9 years to go !
